assertions.evidence: Uses 'export async function generateMetadata(): Promise<Metadata>' with full metadata object. App Router API.
alternates: { canonical: canonicalUrl } present in generateMetadata return object.
Two JSON-LD schemas: '@type': 'Plumber' and '@type': 'FAQPage', injected via JsonLd component.
Section '1. Análisis de la keyword y estrategia' identifies transaccional+urgente intent, explains why landing page (not blog post) is the right format.
H1: 'Fontanero Urgente en Madrid — 24 Horas...' and keyword appears in intro paragraph alongside 'Llámanos ahora'.
